OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE

MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff, Su Ying Guan, is present and in pro per.
Defendant, Sylvia L. Hughes, is present.
Attorney, Courtney Pasion, is representing the defendant through limited scope.

The partis meet and confer.

The case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.

The trial date of NOV-14-2011 is vacated.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-25-2011 Off Calendar
